case_title: JOHN BANKS VS. CUBIC TRANSPORATION SYSTEMS, INC.

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANKS, JOHN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF, CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISSTED BY DEPUTY CLERK PAUL FIOL. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY STERRETT BRANDT - SENIOR CONTRACTS MANAGER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -SIGNED SERVED NOV-04-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CUBIC TRANSPORATION SYSTEMS, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (INCORP SERVICES INC:AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANKS, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT CUBIC TRANSPORATION SYSTEMS, INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY BANKS, JOHN CUBIC TRANSPORATION SYSTEMS, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $20.00 FILED BY BANKS, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT CUBIC TRANSPORATION SYSTEMS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-30-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CUBIC TRANSPORATION SYSTEMS, INC.
